title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Juspay - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Juspay - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Juspay are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Vijayawada. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Juspay:
Juspay is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Juspay!
